markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on the content publishing pause and path forward.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publishing Paused:** Publishing is paused due to internal concerns over legal liability, despite strong content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Nohora will ask Rimkus's legal team if the standard disclaimer is sufficient protection. This is the fastest path to unblocking publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [**Performance Validates Strategy:** The 66 published articles are highly effective, driving 53% of all article clicks and nearly 30% of site impressions.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [**Growth Stalling:** The 3-week pause is causing LLM visibility to decline in Profound, as the strategy requires a constant stream of new content to target new prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)

## Topics

### Publishing Pause & Internal Review

  - [**Problem:** Publishing is paused due to internal concerns over legal liability from technical content.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [**Interim Solution:** A new, less technical content approach is being reviewed by a technical expert.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is a one-time audit to validate the pivot before resuming production.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
      - [**Sustainability Risk:** This review process is not sustainable long-term, as it pulls billable experts from client work.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Proposed Solution: Legal Review of Disclaimer

  - [**Proposal:** Ask Rimkus's legal team if the standard disclaimer (e.g., "for advice only") is sufficient legal protection.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This is the fastest path to unblocking publishing. GrowthX has used this successfully with other clients to address similar liability concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)

### Content Performance & Impact of Pause

  - [**Performance Validates Strategy:** The 66 articles published to date prove the content strategy is effective.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [**Traffic:** Organic traffic remains strong despite the pause.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [**Engagement:** High reader engagement across all content pillars.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
          - [**BES (Mechanical, Electrical, Life Safety):** 82% engaged sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
          - [**"Florida building codes" article:** 96% engagement (28 of 29 sessions).](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Impact:** The 66 articles drive 53% of all article clicks and nearly 30% of site impressions.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [**Impact of Pause:**](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [**LLM Visibility:** Declining in Profound, as the strategy requires a constant stream of new content to target new prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [**Growth:** Stalling. The strategy drove a 57% increase in keyword coverage and 53% growth in article clicks in its first two months.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nohora:**](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
      - [Ask Rimkus's legal team if the standard disclaimer provides sufficient legal protection.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [Expedite the internal technical review to unblock publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
      - [Share the content performance report with Nohora.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
      - [Continue creating new content with the revised approach, staging it for immediate publication once approved.](https://fathom.video/share/_sdeUDY-y75bNHyy7i7nHkis9wbJcaDz?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
